<?php /** * This code was generated by * \ / _ _ _| _ _ * | (_)\/(_)(_|\/| |(/_ v1.0.0 * / / */ namespace Twilio\TwiML\Voice; use Twilio\TwiML\TwiML; class AiSession extends TwiML { /** * AiSession constructor. * * @param array $attributes Optional attributes */ public function __construct($attributes = []) { parent::__construct('AiSession', null, $attributes); } /** * Add AiConnector attribute. * * @param string $aiConnector The unique name or installed add-on sid that * identifies the installed addon resource for the * AI Connector */ public function setAiConnector($aiConnector): self { return $this->setAttribute('aiConnector', $aiConnector); } /** * Add AiSessionConfiguration attribute. * * @param string $aiSessionConfiguration The unique name or id of the AiSession * Configuration resource. */ public function setAiSessionConfiguration($aiSessionConfiguration): self { return $this->setAttribute('aiSessionConfiguration', $aiSessionConfiguration); } }
